colors.accent_metallic: bg-gradient-to-br from-zinc-200 via-zinc-400 to-zinc-700 text-transparent bg-clip-text

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0a0a0c]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 transition-all duration-300
navbar.logo: text-2xl font-black tracking-[0.2em] uppercase bg-gradient-to-r from-zinc-100 to-zinc-500 bg-clip-text text-transparent

hero.style: relative min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden
hero.content_classes: relative z-20 text-center flex flex-col items-center gap-8 max-w-4xl px-4

product_card.style: group relative overflow-hidden bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500
product_card.image_effect: w-full h-full object-cover transform group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out grayscale group-hover:grayscale-0
product_card.content: p-8 flex flex-col justify-end absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/95 via-black/40 to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300

founder_card.style: group relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-white/5 p-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center gap-12
founder_card.image: w-48 h-48 rounded-full object-cover grayscale border-4 border-zinc-800 group-hover:border-zinc-500 transition-all duration-700

contact_form.input: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 text-white px-0 py-4 focus:outline-none focus:border-white transition-colors duration-300 font-light text-lg
contact_form.button: mt-8 inline-flex items-center justify-center px-12 py-5 bg-zinc-100 text-black font-semibold tracking-widest uppercase hover:bg-zinc-300 transition-colors duration-300

motion_and_effects.reveals: Use Framer Motion for slide-up and opacity fade when scrolling into view
motion_and_effects.hover: Subtle scale-up (1.05), grayscale to color transitions, metallic sheen on borders

founders.name: Elena Rostova
founders.bio: Former lead architect at minimal studios, Elena brings her passion for ruthless geometric precision to LUMEN's sanitary lines.

founders.name: Marcus Vance
founders.bio: With a background in aerospace engineering, Marcus ensures every valve and finish meets the absolute pinnacle of durability.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'framer-motion' for fluid reveal animations. Install 'lucide-react' for icons (e.g., social, arrows). Install 'sonner' for success toast.
Do NOT use pure #000000 for main backgrounds; use #0a0a0c (obsidian) for the deepest level and #131315 for surface cards.
Implement the navbar as a sticky top component with a glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-black/50) and a subtle bottom border. Must be responsive.
The Hero section MUST have the hero_bg image with a bg-black/60 overlay. The hero text must use the metallic gradient text class.

The Products section should be a Bento-style asymmetric grid (Mode A: The Tetris Grid). Use the provided 'span' fields to create an interesting asymmetric layout on md/lg screens. Do not use equal squares.

For the Contact Us form, use minimal HTML elements. Input fields should just be bottom-bordered (border-b) without full backgrounds, simulating a high-end editorial form. Implement a generic React state for submission that triggers a success toast via sonner.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements: e.g., data-testid='nav-home-link', data-testid='contact-submit-button'.
Keep typography strict: Headings in Clash Display (uppercase, tight tracking), Body in Manrope.
Do NOT use Shadcn's card component if it enforces white backgrounds or thick borders; build custom HTML components with tailwind to match this dark metallic aesthetic.
